name: core-agent
description: Thin router agent that receives plain natural language requests, classifies intent, and delegates to the appropriate Terraform subagent. Does not run scripts directly.
welcomeMessage:
DSO AI Core Agent ready. Send a request like:
  - Create S3 bucket with versioning in workspace aws-demo-resource in dev
  - Plan workspace aws-demo-resource in staging
  - Apply the latest plan for workspace aws-demo-resource in dev
